title: Fix congress_finalize prompt to not include evolution verdicts

log.context: Fix congress_finalize prompt to not include evolution verdicts

Done. Here's a summary:

**What the problem was:**
Ibrahim's persona file (`hiring-manager.md`) explicitly tells him he can issue `EVOLVE/FIRE/RETAIN` verdicts on personas. When asked to synthesize debate results, he was including those judgments in his synthesis text — but `congress_evolve` (which actually handles evolution) runs as a separate activity *after* `congress_finalize`. This produced contradictory verdicts in the output.

**Root cause location:**
